description.unified: Dispels negative effects from the ally with the lowest HP, healing HP of the target by ??? and HP of allies nearby equal to 40% of Heal Rate.
Casts a shield on all allies that absorbs ??? DMG for [7 sec->12 sec]. While the shield is in effect, the target increases its ATK by [25%->20%], Heal Rate by [65%->50%] and gains immunity to CC.

Attacks the target and its nearby enemies 6 times, dealing up to ??? M.DMG. 500 additional Crit Chance applies to this Skill. Hit targets will be blinded for [3.5 sec->6 sec], and take 25% increased All DMG for 10 sec.

Reduces All DMG taken by 15%. At the beginning of each battle, and every [14 sec->15 sec], increases M.DEF of 1 ally with the lowest HP by ??? for [7 sec->10 sec] and heals HP of the target by 15% for the duration of Skill.

light.unified: In exchange for 1 additional Mana Cost, the skill targets 2 allies.
In exchange for 1 additional Mana Cost, DMG is increased by 80%.
Reduces DMG the target takes from Non-Hero enemies by [40%->30%] for the duration of Skill.

description.unified: [Blessings of Light] Increases shield amount by 50% and recovers {0} Mana every second for 4 sec.
[Heaven's Vengeance] Target takes 20% increased M.DMG for 10 sec, and Blind duration is increased by {0} sec.
Every 8 sec, heals 4 allies with the lowest HP by {0}% of own ATK, and increases Crit Chance by [200->300] and Crit DMG by {1}% for the ally with the highest ATK for 8 sec.
